holdings.infoBox: RSP is an equity ETF with a total of 509 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sandisk stock at 0.56%, Dell Technologies at 0.50%, Intel at 0.48%, Advanced Micro Devices at 0.46%, and Seagate Technology Holdings at 0.45%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P 500 Equal Weight ETF (RSP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Equal Weighted index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of S&P 500 companies. RSP was launched on Apr 24, 2003 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: S&P 500 Snapshot: Weekly Win Streak Continues
data.text: The S&P 500 closed out the week with another record high, finishing up 0.9% from last Friday. This marks the fifth straight weekly gain for the index, the longest streak since October 2024.

data.title: These alternative index strategies are beating the S&P 500 after the stock market's new highs
